ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the product (e.g., pages, units) */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "buy_now" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product can be purchased immediately */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary supplier of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product is active and available for purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the supplier is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the manufacturer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the manufacturer */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the manufacturer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the manufacturer is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "supplier_part_number" TEXT /* Supplier's part number for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_manufacturers" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method */,
  "shipping_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping provider */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "is_gift" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the order is a gift */,
  "gift_message" TEXT /* Gift message if the order is a gift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_provider_id") REFERENCES shipping_providers ("shipping_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("shipping_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the product */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "is_subscribed_to_newsletter" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the address belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the payment method belongs to */,
  "payment_method_type" TEXT /* Type of payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_method_token" TEXT /* Token representing the payment method */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of credit card (e.g., Visa, MasterCard) */,
  "card_last_four_digits" TEXT /* Last four digits of the credit card */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the credit card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the review belongs to */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review has been approved for display */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_providers" (
  "shipping_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_provider_id")
)
